scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ui-sentinel/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @ui-sentinel/control-plane && npm run build --workspace @ui-sentinel/demo-react-app
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @ui-sentinel/shared-types && npm run typecheck --workspace @ui-sentinel/control-plane && npm run typecheck --workspace @ui-sentinel/demo-react-app
